"'''Ground Assault: The Vehicles of Episode III'''", is an 8-page reference article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 83|''Star Wars Insider'' 83]]. It was written by [[Daniel Wallace]].

{{Magazine-stub|article}}

==Contents==
*[[HAVw A6 Juggernaut/Legends|Republic juggernaut]]
*[[HMP droid gunship/Legends|Droid gunship]]
*[[Oevvaor jet catamaran/Legends|Wookiee catamaran]]
*[[BARC speeder/Legends|BARC speeder]]
*[[Infantry Support Platform/Legends|Swamp speeder]]
*[[Emergency firespeeder/Legends|Coruscant fireship]]
*[[All Terrain Recon Transport/Legends|AT-RT]]
*[[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]' [[Tsmeu-6 personal wheel bike|wheel bike]]
